kinyarwanda.sr_assessed: Ibitekerezo by'umutoza byiteguye hepfo ya builder panel
kinyarwanda.recall_needs_more: Banza wongeremo nibura ibitekerezo 4 mu matsinda 2
kinyarwanda.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: ibitekerezo byose byaguye muri tray. Subiza buri kimwe aho kigomba kuba.
kinyarwanda.sr_recall_complete: Wongeye kubaka isi yawe yose ukoresheje kwibuka!
kinyarwanda.import_replaces: Ibi bizasimbura composition yawe ya none.
kinyarwanda.title: Amashusho Yigenga
kinyarwanda.tagline: Ubaka Isi y'Amashusho yawe: hitamo archetypal structure, uyuzuze ibitekerezo byawe, ubishyire mu 3D, kandi ubaje ibihamsha akamaro.
kinyarwanda.tagline2: Hano ni wowe umwanditsi — AI itanga gusa ubuyobozi, kandi gusa iyo ubisabye.
kinyarwanda.keep_content_hint: Amatsinda n'ibitekerezo byawe birasigara — guhitamo ishusho bihindura gusa uko umwanya usa.
kinyarwanda.print_tip: Kuramo one-pager ishobora gucapwa (snapshot + ibitekerezo byawe + ibitekerezo by'umutoza)
kinyarwanda.recall_tip: Ibitekerezo byawe bigwa muri tray — bisubize ukoresheje kwibuka
kinyarwanda.assess_tip: Saba AI coach kureba composition yawe yose
kinyarwanda.recall_instructions: Ibitekerezo byose byavuye ahantu habyo bigwa muri tray hepfo. Hitamo igitekerezo mu mwanya, hanyuma ukoreshe group chips (cyangwa buto [ na ]) kugira ngo ukigarure iwabo. Nta kintu kibikwa mu gihe cy'umukino.
kinyarwanda.no_3d: Ntibyashobotse gupakira 3D space hano — builder panel yawe iracyakora, kandi ibyo wandika byose birabikwa.
kinyarwanda.stage_hint: Mu mwanya: kurura igitekerezo kugira ngo ukishyireho · kurura background kugira ngo uzunguruke · scroll kugira ngo ubyongere · [ na ] bimura igitekerezo cyatoranyijwe hagati y'amatsinda.
